trigger_condition: Synthesis skill file missing or unreadable
User feedback variables undefined or null

potential_consequence: File write fails with directory error

trigger_condition: All three perspectives rejected by user
guard_snippet: if ({architect_accepted} === false && {developer_accepted} === false && {qa_accepted} === false) { skip_story_update(); log('No perspectives accepted'); }
potential_consequence: Empty synthesis or inappropriate story updates

trigger_condition: Story.md file deleted or moved during synthesis
guard_snippet: if (!file_exists('sprints/SW-XXX/story.md')) { halt('Story file missing, cannot update'); }
if (token_count(synthesis_output) > budget_limit) { truncate_synthesis(); log_warn('Synthesis truncated to fit budget'); }

trigger_condition: Validation checks fail after story.md already written
guard_snippet: backup = backup_file('sprints/SW-XXX/story.md'); if (!validate()) { restore(backup); halt('Validation failed, restored backup'); }
if (!config.has('token_budgets.{platform}.coordination')) { use_default_budget(4000); log_warn('Using default token budget'); }
if (!config.has('token_budgets.{platform}')) { log_warn('Unknown platform, using claude-code budget'); platform = 'claude-code'; }

trigger_condition: User provides suggest-changes instead of accept/reject
